title: features.json
description: Read-only projection of the SQLite features table, written by the harness into the worktree before each phase and deleted afterward. Implementers may read but not write it (plan-draft3 §File Contract, D10). The canonical store is SQLite. Status updates flow through .yoke/status-updates.jsonl.

project.description: Project name, copied from workflow config at projection time.

needs_more_planning.description: Optional planner-emitted flag consumed by a post: check-needs-more-planning command (plan-draft3 §Phase Pre/Post Commands example). Not interpreted by the harness directly; the action grammar decides what it means.

id.description: Stable feature identifier. Matches the SQLite features.id primary key.

category.description: Grouping label used by the feature board (D44).

depends_on.description: Feature ids this feature depends on. Must form a DAG (plan-draft3 §Workflow Lifecycle: Plan).

acceptance_criteria.description: Planner-defined acceptance criteria. Each criterion must receive an explicit verdict from every reviewer (review.schema.json).

review_criteria.description: Planner-defined review criteria. Same coverage rule.

current_phase.description: Free-text phase label. Not an enum — phases are user-defined (plan-draft3 §Core Design Principles #7).
